title: Missing Recommended Security Headers
description: The application response is missing one or more commonly recommended HTTP security headers.
impact: Missing headers can increase exposure to clickjacking, content sniffing, and policy bypass risks.
likelihood: Medium for internet-facing services with default or weak hardening.
recommendations: Set X-Frame-Options or frame-ancestors to reduce clickjacking risk.
Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff and modern policy headers.
